title: The Splash Milk
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ELrdP6OH/images/4baf5614427784f3291106169727640989fb0abd.png)
# 🥛 Description: 
Too much hassle to bring buckets of milk? Why can't milk be packed in a potion bottle when potions can be packed in a potion bottle?  
This mod adds Splash Milk Bottle, Lingering Milk Bottle and, of course, Milk Bottle, easy-to-brew and ready-to-use.   
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ELrdP6OH/images/d948e42006d49f70fc1213a26647d1db8054a353.gif)
# 🧿 How to obtain splash-bottled milk?
Well, it is super easy.  BTW You can use a water bottle, or you can use awkward potion, mundane potion or thick potion as well.  
In newest version, you can craft milk bottles **in shapeless crafting** with 3 glass bottles and a bucket of milk, and **upgrade them in brewing stand**!  
(**Important notice**: You can only put exactly 1 bottle of milk into brewing stand due to Original Brewing Stand Design! And I do not have plan to change it.)
